content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

The amendment identifies a real stale-approval merge hazard in the PR watcher.

## Votes

- `fr-3-51cf3326`: Accept
  The current merge path combines the current PR head SHA and CI status with a bot reaction enum that has discarded all commit or timing context. An old +1 reaction can survive a later push, while line comments are filtered to the current head and therefore may disappear from consideration. The --match-head-style merge guard only prevents a race after the status read; it does not prove the bot approved that head. Requiring approval metadata tied to status.head_sha, or an equivalent latest-push-safe proof, is a correctness and safety improvement.
